creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
www/webtrees 1.7.x is really only useful now for migrating from phpGedView to webtrees before moving to www/webtrees20.  I guess, since upstream says that 1.7.20 will be the last release on the 1.7.x track, it makes sense to still keep this port for now and to apply your update patch.

I am unable to test the patch at the moment, but since you've tested on poudrière, I'll okay it.

There is a webtrees 2.1.x now too.  We should probably rename webtrees20 to webtrees21 or to webtrees2 and update that too.  I also do not have time to do that at the moment, either.  A big thank you if you'd care to do that too.  You are also welcome to take over maintainership of these two if you think you have time to keep them up-to-date.  I'm afraid these have become low priority for me.
